reasoning: The probability of this event is extremely low. NUFORC receives roughly 300 to 500 reports per month globally, with the vast majority originating from the US and other Western English-speaking nations. Reports from the African continent make up a tiny fraction of the total (historically <1%). Of all civilian UFO reports, those specifically submitted by or involving pilots as witnesses are also very rare (likely under 5%). The intersection of these three conditions—a pilot report, originating from an African country, occurring in the single specific month of June 2025—represents an extremely rare conjunctive event. With no particular anticipated event driving a surge of African pilot reports in June 2025, the base rate probability of this exact combination occurring in a given month is estimated to be well below 5%. Consequently, I'm issuing a forecast of 3%.
batch_queries: Will a pilot report of UFOs come from a country in Africa in June 2025?
